include(Einsums_Message)

# cmake-format: off
set(_Einsums_modules

  BLASBase
  BLASVendor
  BlockManager
  BufferAllocator
  CommandLine
  Concepts
  Config
  CXX23
  Debugging
  Errors
  FFT
  GPU
  Comm
  SIMD
  HPTT
  Iterator
  LinearAlgebra

  Preprocessor
  Print
  Profile
  Python
  Runtime
  RuntimeConfiguration
  StringUtil
  TaskPool
  Tensor
  PackedGemm
  TensorAlgebra
  ComputeGraphTypes
  ComputeGraph
  TensorIO
  TensorBase
  TensorImpl
  TensorUtilities
  TypeSupport
  Utilities
  Version
  )
# cmake-format: on

einsums_info("")
einsums_info("  Configuring Einsums modules:")

foreach(module ${_Einsums_modules})
  einsums_info("    ${module}")
  add_subdirectory(${module})
endforeach()
